query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `website_platform_credentials` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `wpcUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `wpcWebsiteId` int NOT NULL,
  `wpcPlatform` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `wpcCredentialsJson` text NOT NULL,
  `wpcCreatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `wpcUpdatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `website_platform_credentials_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `wpc_user_website_idx` (`wpcUserId`, `wpcWebsiteId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `wpc_unique` (`wpcUserId`, `wpcWebsiteId`, `wpcPlatform`)
);

  `wpcCredentialsJson` text NOT NULL,
  `wpcCreatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
